steps.title: Locate the intersection
steps.content: A solution to a graphed system is the point where the two graphs intersect. Here, the line and the nonlinear graph meet at one visible point.

steps.title: Read the coordinates
steps.content: The intersection has $x$-coordinate $-2$ and $y$-coordinate $6$, so the solution is $(-2,6)$. The answer is B.
